captures.caption: Two enemies now, started at different heights and driven by one indexed loop — each drifts and respawns on its own from the same shared code.
captures.alt: Two green enemy sprites descend the screen at once from different starting heights, each independently reaching the bottom and reappearing at the top in a new column.

captures.caption: One more constant and an extra sprite turns two into three — the full wave descends, and the same shot can pick off any of them, the score climbing with each.
captures.alt: Three green enemies descend together. The ship moves beneath them and fires; individual enemies flash white and are destroyed as the score in the corner rises.
